evidence.content: More than 100 US-based international law experts have signed an open letter condemning US and Israeli military strikes on Iran as a violation of the UN Charter and potentially amounting to 'war crimes'.
The bombing of the biggest bridge in Iran was a 'double tap' strike; the second strike occurred while emergency responders were assisting the wounded.
Iran is now shooting at the U.S. aircraft conducting the rescue mission; this footage shows an American plane firing flares to avoid targeting, turning the rescue operation into a combat operation.
China criticizes Trump for having 'created a Global Crisis OUT OF NOTHING' in relation to Iran.
Iran provided crucial aid to the economically crippled Philippines, while the US exploited land for forward bases in a war of aggression by US-Israel.
A possible blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is raising alarms because crude oil touches almost everything in your life, indicating global economic stability concerns.
Elon Musk announced 'Grok Imagine Pro mode' for enhanced 1080P images and video capabilities, expected later this month.
A claim by @GBX_Press about the Iranian Revolutionary Guards downing an American F-15 fighter jet on Qeshm Island is contested by a comment suggesting the accompanying video is fake.
